title: cordula amabilis
intro: Cordula amabilis, also known as Toothache Plant, is a tropical plant species in the family Gesneriaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cordula amabilis include relief from toothaches, gum inflammation, and oral infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its herbal properties for treating various oral health issues.
